name: reset_ucf
short_description: Clear floorplan constraints read in from a file
full_help:
reset_ucf

Description: 
Clear floorplan constraints read in from a file

Syntax: 
reset_ucf  [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      UCF file to be reset

Categories: 
Floorplan

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
